name: Cisco Meraki
description: Cloud-managed networking platform. Monitor network infrastructure and device access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Meraki Dashboard
2. Go to Organization → Settings
3. Under API access, enable API and generate an API key
4. Copy the key and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Meraki Dashboard → Organization → Settings → API access → Generate API key.

checks.name: Cisco Meraki Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies access to Meraki network management.
